items.name: Kirsty Robertson
items.quote: After one session on that machine, I had a month of traveling, doing a lot of sitting, and my hip was absolutely fine. It blew me away.

items.name: Brian Caccaniga
items.quote: Pop, I feel like I can twist my back. It's not hurting. I can bend down.

items.name: Ethan Leeds
items.quote: I like to think of the P90 in its very simple form as a human battery charger. We being the battery, the P90 being the charger.

items.name: Luigi
items.quote: I have the strength of Hercules to be able to do all these little changes in my life.

items.name: Jim Feldman
items.quote: Something I'd struggled with for over 20 years — just gone. My monthly psychologist visits, gone. Medication I'd relied on for years, gone.
